mnemonics.title: NETCONF Layer Stack (bottom to top)
mnemonics.content: TROCK: Transport, RPC, Operations, Content, Know-it-all. Build from the ground up: secure transport first, then messaging, then operations, then data.

mnemonics.title: YANG Data Constructs
mnemonics.content: Lucky Llamas Carry Lists Carefully: Leaf, Leaf-list, Container, List, Choice. These five constructs model all IoT device data.

mnemonics.title: IoT Management Workflow
mnemonics.content: DCMAM: Discover, Configure, Monitor, Act, Maintain. Think of it as the lifecycle of managing an IoT device from first connection to ongoing maintenance.

mnemonics.title: NETCONF vs SNMP Advantages
mnemonics.content: STV wins: Security (SSH vs community strings), Transactions (atomic commit/rollback), Validation (YANG constraints vs flat MIBs). Three reasons NETCONF beats SNMP for IoT.
